(1 inline comment)

I agree with Alex that ->put() for pause is probably not needed. For internal tests, can we not also have OSD thread check same OBD_FAIL to pause as needed?  This shouldn't happen in real life, I think. 

Not critical, so it can go in a later cleanup patch.

parents.subject: LU-1866 lfsck: ancillary work for namespace LFSCK

commit.subject: LU-1866 lfsck: general framework for LFSCK 1.5
commit.message:
LU-1866 lfsck: general framework for LFSCK 1.5

LFSCK 1.5 main data structure definations, LFSCK
component APIs, setup/cleanup/start/stop interfaces.

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I4507b9432289ca8d54cbf686893b706052d0eeb3
